query: SELECT DATE(receivedAt) as day, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM emails GROUP BY DATE(receivedAt) ORDER BY day ASC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2VBfwL6sVAbaZAE.root --database KuriegSE9E2r7xqu9W7qQS --execute SELECT DATE(receivedAt) as day, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM emails GROUP BY DATE(receivedAt) ORDER BY day ASC;
